visual_description: Two men sit in the front seats of a car at night, the driver on the left and a passenger on the right, both looking forward with serious expressions. The scene shifts to a man in a dark suit holding a plastic water bottle with both hands in a dimly lit room with framed photos on the wall. Another man in a suit looks downward, followed by a man in a white shirt wearing headphones while observing a computer monitor.
